title: ISS: Food Spelling
description: An add-on mod for Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks that allows you to imbue any kind of food with spells using the Arcane Anvil.
body:
# ISS: Food Spelling

An add-on mod for **Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks** that allows you to imbue any kind of food with spells using the
**Arcane Anvil**.

# Description

This mod does one thing: it allows you to imbue any kind of food with spells using the **Arcane Anvil**, and casting the
imbued spell when the food is consumed.

# License

This mod is open-source under the **MIT License**.

You may include it in your modpacks/servers as long as you **comply with the license terms**.
